chapter5Carryover.note: Conquest restores Azura with the stats she had at the end of Chapter 5; her Chapter 9 inventory is a Vulnerary and Chest Key. Weapon-proficiency carryover is intentionally not asserted here.
chapter5Carryover.noteZhHans: 暗夜线会以阿库娅在第 5 章结束时的属性使其复归；她第 9 章的物品为伤药与宝箱钥匙。此处有意不主张武器熟练度的继承。

npcScaling.note: NPC Anna scales from level 10 at the earliest Chapter 7 access to level 18 at Chapter 27. After the first clear, the recruited Anna is reset to her fixed level 10 join data; the NPC's scaled level, stats, weapon rank, and carried battle items do not transfer.
npcScaling.noteZhHans: NPC 安娜的等级从最早可在第 7 章进入时的 10 级，随章节缩放至第 27 章的 18 级。首次通关后，被招募的安娜会重置为其固定的 10 级加入数据；NPC 缩放后的等级、属性、武器等级与携带的战斗道具都不会转移。

routeJoins.condition: After Chapter 18, raise the Fire Orb to level 3 and refresh My Castle by waiting for the real-time update or completing any map.

myCastleRecruitment.note: After Chapter 18 is complete, upgrade the Fire Orb to level 3 and refresh My Castle by waiting for the real-time update or by completing any map.
myCastleRecruitment.noteZhHans: 第 18 章完成后，将火焰宝珠升至 3 级，并通过等待实时更新或完成任意地图来刷新我的城堡。

autoLevel.note: The game compares the applicable chapter map level with Flora's internal level 28. Her joining level is 5 + max(0, map level - 28), capped at level 15. Stats use (Flora's individual growth rates + Maid class growth rates) from her level 5 Conquest bases, with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Exact weapon-rank milestones remain unresolved.
autoLevel.noteZhHans: 游戏会将适用章节的地图等级与芙洛拉的内部等级 28 比较。她的加入等级为 5 + max(0, 地图等级 − 28)，上限为 15 级。属性采用（芙洛拉的个人成长率 + 女仆职业成长率），基于她第 5 章暗夜线的基础值，恰为 0.5 时向上取整。确切的武器等级里程碑仍未确定。

autoLevel.noteZhHans: 游戏会将适用章节的地图等级与芙洛拉的内部等级 28 比较。她的加入等级为 5 + max(0, 地图等级 − 28)，上限为 15 级；因此透魔线在第 22 章后从 7 级开始。属性采用（芙洛拉的个人成长率 + 女仆职业成长率），基于她第 5 章的基础值，恰为 0.5 时向上取整。确切的武器等级里程碑仍未确定。

autoLevel.note: The game compares the applicable chapter map level with Yukimura's internal level 33. His joining level is 10 + max(0, map level - 33), capped at level 15, so he remains level 10 through Chapter 24 before reaching levels 11, 13, and 15 in Chapters 25-27. Stats use (Yukimura's individual growth rates + Mechanist class growth rates) from his level 10 bases, with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Exact weapon-rank milestones remain unresolved.
autoLevel.noteZhHans: 游戏会将适用章节的地图等级与幸村的内部等级 33 比较。他的加入等级为 10 + max(0, 地图等级 − 33)，上限为 15 级，因此他在第 24 章前保持 10 级，随后在第 25–27 章达到 11、13、15 级。属性采用（幸村的个人成长率 + 傀儡师职业成长率），基于他第 10 级的基础值，恰为 0.5 时向上取整。确切的武器等级里程碑仍未确定。
